activation_results.reason: Input matches the description's canonical use case verbatim.

criterion_results.text: No American spellings present in the narrative (color, optimize, behavior, organize, center, defense, license as a verb, analyze) — Australian or neutral forms both pass

criterion_results.text: Output is structured and parseable per the declared schema

judge_result.notes: The artefact satisfies all three criteria. Narrative uses Australian/neutral spellings with AU context (AUD, GST, Koala & Co.). Structure is parseable markdown with a canonical events mapping table covering GA4/Meta Pixel/CAPI/dataLayer, per-event param schemas with types and derivations, an inconsistencies register with severity ratings, and actionable next steps. Both required canonical section headings are present verbatim.
